selection_scope: Clean/SemiClean/node diagnostic only; original BUT report-only
threshold: good: qrs_visibility>=0.432896 & non_qrs_diff_p95<=0.0589044; medium: qrs_visibility<=0.338125 & non_qrs_diff_p95>=0.0699296
rule_description: If a base endpoint predicts medium but QRS is visible and non-QRS detail is low, switch to good. If it predicts good but QRS is weak and non-QRS detail is high, switch to medium.
threshold_selection: thresholds chosen on N7110 train+val overlap errors, then applied to N7200 rows
note: Rule-mode artifact only. Does not overwrite ordinary checkpoint promotion.
